---
title: "code.qmd"
author: "Kyra Baranick"
format: html
editor: visual
---

[My GitHub Repository](baranickkyra/ENVS-193DS_homework-03: Homework Three for ENVS193DS)

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)

salinity <- "salinity-pickleweed.csv"
Kyra_data <- "personal_data.csv"

```

# Problem 1

### a. 

I could do a linear regression test or a Pearson's correlation test. Pearson’s correlation measures the stregeth and direction of a linear association between the two variables, while linear regression quantifies the relationship (predictor and response) by estimating how biomass changes with salinity (uses slope and intercept).
